info.name: Argo CD API
Applications
Argo CD Argo List Applications

params.name: appNamespace
params.description: The application namespace to filter by.

items.docs: Returns a list of all Argo CD applications, optionally filtered by project, namespace, or name. Each application includes its current sync status, health status, source configuration, and destination cluster details.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Create an Application

params.name: upsert
params.description: If true, perform an upsert rather than a create, updating the application if it already exists.

items.docs: Creates a new Argo CD application from the provided Application manifest. The application must reference a valid project, source repository, and destination cluster. Optionally upsert to update an existing application with the same name.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Get an Application

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the Argo CD application.

items.docs: Returns the full specification and current status of a named Argo CD application, including sync status, health status, resource tree, and operation state.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Update an Application

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the Argo CD application.

items.docs: Replaces the specification of an existing Argo CD application with the provided manifest. Used to update source, destination, sync policy, or other application configuration.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Delete an Application

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the Argo CD application.

params.name: cascade
params.description: Cascade deletion to managed Kubernetes resources.

params.name: propagationPolicy
params.description: Kubernetes resource deletion propagation policy (foreground, background, orphan).

items.docs: Deletes the named Argo CD application. Optionally cascades deletion to all managed Kubernetes resources in the destination cluster.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Sync an Application

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the Argo CD application.

items.docs: Triggers a synchronization of the named Argo CD application, reconciling the live Kubernetes state with the desired state from the Git source. Supports selective resource sync, dry-run mode, force sync, and prune of removed resources.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Rollback an Application

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the Argo CD application.

items.docs: Rolls back the named application to a previous deployed revision. Requires the ID of a history entry from the application's deployment history.

info.name: Projects
Argo CD Argo List Projects

items.docs: Returns all Argo CD projects. Projects provide logical grouping, access control, and policy enforcement for applications.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Create a Project

items.docs: Creates a new Argo CD project with the specified source repositories, destination clusters/namespaces, and resource allow/deny policies.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Get a Project

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the Argo CD project.

items.docs: Returns the specification and detailed information for a named project.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Delete a Project

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the Argo CD project.

items.docs: Deletes the named Argo CD project. The project must have no associated applications before it can be deleted.

info.name: Repositories
Argo CD Argo List Repositories

items.docs: Returns all registered Git and Helm chart repositories, including their connection status and type.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Register a Repository

items.docs: Registers a new Git or Helm chart repository with Argo CD. Supports HTTPS, SSH, and GitHub App authentication methods.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Delete a Repository

items.docs: Removes the named repository registration from Argo CD.

info.name: Clusters
Argo CD Argo List Clusters

items.docs: Returns all registered Kubernetes clusters available as deployment targets for Argo CD applications.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Register a Cluster

items.docs: Registers a new Kubernetes cluster as a deployment target. The cluster must be reachable from the Argo CD server and the provided credentials must have sufficient permissions.

info.name: Session
Argo CD Argo Create a Session (login)

items.docs: Authenticates with username and password or SSO token and returns a bearer token for use in subsequent API requests.

info.name: Argo CD Argo Delete a Session (logout)

items.docs: Invalidates the current bearer token, logging out the authenticated user.

info.name: Version
Argo CD Argo Get Server Version

items.docs: Returns the Argo CD server version, build date, Git commit SHA, Go version, and Kubernetes server version.

info.name: Settings
Argo CD Argo Get Server Settings

items.docs: Returns the Argo CD server configuration including OIDC settings, Helm settings, resource tracking method, and UI customization.
